title: Project Coordinator
raw_description:
Job Descriptions

  • Handle project coordination and responsible for all works in designated projects
  • Responsible for overseeing the overall site progress to ensure the structural, architectural and MEP works of the project team and sub-contractors are in compliance with the defined standards and Safety regulations.
  • Liaise with project engineer, site supervisor on all the coordination shop drawings.
  • Plan and advise the construction foreman on sequencing and arrangement of work.
  • Provide regular reports to the Project Manager on the progress of overall works in assigned projects.
  • Attend technical meeting/site meetings with consultants, and provide technical solutions.
  • Ensure architectural works are carried out according to specifications/drawings.
  • Inform Project Manager on any technical / site problems pertaining to architectural works.

Requirements

  • Diploma/ Degree in Mechanical Engineering and/ or building and construction relevant field
  • Well-versed in the operations, coordination and details for architectural, structural and M&E field works
  • Strong leadership to monitor Coordinators and Foremen for the works executed

title: Campaign Executive, Banking (6 months contract) UID:2269
raw_description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Social & Digital Platform Experimentation
    Drive and support experimentation across social and digital platforms, including but not limited to Xiaohongshu and Eternity X, to expand offshore audience reach.

  • International Brand Campaign Support
    Support the execution of international brand campaigns for the Treasures segment, ensuring alignment with global strategies while addressing local market nuances.

  • Lifestyle / Everyday CVP Communications & Product Launches
    Assist in the development and execution of communications for Lifestyle/Everyday Customer Value Proposition (CVP), as well as new product launches including Digibank, Cards, and Payments.

  • Event Support
    Provide end-to-end support for key events such as the Symposium, covering planning, coordination, and on-site execution.

  • Branch Communications
    Drive and implement effective communications for the branch network, including seasonal campaigns such as Chinese New Year (CNY) and Diwali.

  • Audience Insights & Analysis
    Support the extraction and analysis of audience insights, with a focus on key segments such as young affluents, to inform marketing strategies and campaign development.

Qualifications

  • Strong interest in brand marketing and financial services

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field

  • Minimum 5 years of marketing experience, preferably within finance or wealth marketing

  • Strong stakeholder management, organizational, and multitasking abilities

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

  • Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams

  • Event planning and project management experience is an advantage

  • Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and proactive in identifying areas for improvement



We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

title: Full-Time Tutor (Choa Chu Kang)
raw_description:
Full-Time Tutor (Tampines) 

📍 Location: TutorJohn Learning Centre – Tampines
💼 Position: Full-Time Primary/ Secondary Tutor (Multi-Disciplinary)
💰 Salary: $3,000 – $4,200/month (Based on Experience + Performance Bonuses)
🗓 Work Days: 4 Weekdays + 1 Weekend
🕒 Hours:
• Weekdays: 1:00 PM – 9:30 PM / 2:00 PM – 10:30 PM
• Weekends: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

🌟 About TutorJohn Learning Centre

TutorJohn is a fast-growing tuition brand with 3 branches across Singapore – two in Choa Chu Kang and one in Tampines. We provide English, Math, Science, and Chinese lessons and focus strongly on building student confidence through clear teaching systems.

We are hiring a Full-Time Primary Tutor (Multi-Disciplinary) who is comfortable supporting students across subjects, with a focus on the Primary & Secondary level.

✨ Why Join Us?

🔹 Small Class Sizes – Max 6 students per class
🔹 Stable Full-Time Career Track – grow into Assistant Centre Manager
🔹 Performance Bonuses – increments tied to results and contribution
🔹 Strong Team Support – shared materials + consistent teaching structure
🔹 Hands-On Training & Mentorship – improve pedagogy and delivery quality

👩‍🏫 Your Key Responsibilities

✅ Teach Primary & Secondary Subjects (Multi-Discipline)
• Teach up to 3 classes/day
• Conduct lessons aligned to latest MOE syllabus
• Support Primary & Secondary students in structured improvement for:

  • English (writing + comprehension)

  • Math (concept mastery + problem solving)

  • Science (foundation + answering techniques)

✅ Student Progress & Parent Confidence
• Run short assessments and identify learning gaps
• Adjust teaching strategy based on student needs and performance trends

✅ Operational Support
• Lesson preparation, resources, scheduling support
• Assist in smooth day-to-day centre operations

✅ Leadership Growth Opportunities
• Work closely with the team and John
• Progression pathway to Assistant Centre Manager for strong performers

🎯 Who We’re Looking For

✔ Diploma/Degree holders (Education-related fields a plus)
✔ Preferably 1+ year teaching experience (fresh grads welcome)
✔ Strong fundamentals in Primary & Secondary subjects
✔ Confident classroom control + clear explanation skills
✔ Responsible, consistent, and committed to student outcomes
✔ Able to commit until end of academic year

🚀 Apply now:
Register here (5 minutes): https://tinyurl.com/TuitionCentreJobRegistration
Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

title: Graduate Officer, Compliance
raw_description:
At Bank of Communications, we are dedicated to fostering talent and innovation in a dynamic and supportive environment, providing opportunities for growth and development. We are excited to invite enthusiastic and driven fresh graduates to apply for the position of Graduate Officer in our Compliance department. This is an entry-level role designed to provide on the job training and hands-on experience in the chosen field. You will work closely with seasoned professionals to gain valuable insights, contribute to meaningful projects and develop a strong foundation for your career.


· Report to Head of Compliance

· Assist in monitoring and ensuring adherence to company policies and regulatory requirements

· Support the development and implementation of compliance and AML program and initiatives

· Conduct research and analysis to identify potential compliance risks

· Collaborate with various departments to ensure compliance with internal and external standards

· Assist in AML/CFT name screening on a daily basis in a timely manner

· Coordinate with relevant departments/personnel to resolve any name screening issues including system issues

· Assist in the preparation of AML/CFT name screening statistics and reporting

· Assist in the preparation of training and guidance materials relating to name screening

· Undertake any other additional tasks and responsibilities assigned by department head


REQUIREMENTS

· Recent graduates with a Bachelor’s degree from reputable Universities

· Strong interest in compliance and eagerness to learn

· Strong analytical skills, excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills

· Good communication skills both verbal and written with ability to interact comfortably with a variety of stakeholders.

title: Quality Assurance Engineer ( Junior )
raw_description:
About Us

Innovate. Create. Elevate.

At Vertis, we believe innovation starts with people. We design and deliver exceptional digital solutions that elevate our clients' brands and the experiences they create for their customers. Through technology-driven creativity, we enable meaningful business transformation. Our team is made up of capable, confident, and motivated individuals who collaborate, challenge ideas, and grow together.

About the Job

Join our dynamic team and play a crucial role in ensuring software quality. As a Junior QA Engineer, you will be introduced to the fundamentals of manual and automated testing, working under the guidance of experienced professionals to ensure product quality and performance.

Key Responsibilities

  • Learn and assist in the development, implementation, and maintenance of test scripts to ensure test coverage.
  • Collaborate with development and product teams to understand requirements and assist in designing test strategies.
  • Assist in identifying, documenting, and tracking defects, working closely with developers for resolution.
  • Perform basic functional and regression testing, with opportunities to learn automation tools.
  • Participate in continuous improvement of the testing process and framework.
  • Receive mentorship in conducting code reviews and understanding high-quality code standards.
  • Analyze test results with guidance and contribute to reports on product quality.
  • Engage in learning opportunities related to industry trends and advancements in testing tools and methodologies.
  • Assist in ensuring all deliverables meet quality standards and project timelines.

Requirements and Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
  • Basic understanding of software testing concepts and methodologies.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow instructions.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to work effectively in a team environment.
  • Willingness to learn and grow in the field of software quality assurance.

Security Requirement (Mandatory)

This role involves work on Singapore Government projects. Candidates must have the legal right to work in Singapore and must be eligible for the required security clearance. Appointment to this role is subject to successful completion of all security vetting and clearance requirements.

Benefits

  • Best in class compensation
  • Medical Benefits
  • International and multicultural environment
  • Training & Development
  • Career opportunities in a successful, fast-growing company

Our Hiring Process

After submitting your application, our Talent Acquisition team will review your profile. If your skills and experience align with the role, we'll get in touch to discuss the next steps. Please be cautious of recruitment fraud; only engage with emails from our official team that end with @vertis.digital domain.

Vertis is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We believe that diversity of thought, background, and experience drives innovation and success. That's why we are committed to building and nurturing a team that reflects a wide range of perspectives, abilities, identities, and experiences. At Vertis, every voice matters, and together, we achieve more. We appreciate all applications; however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you for your interest.

The use of artificial intelligence tools, including language models such as ChatGPT, during the interview process is strictly prohibited and will result in the disqualification of your application.

Singapore Citizens are welcome to apply. This position is supported by IMDA's Company-Led Training Programme.

title: Geotechnical Design Engineer
raw_description:
We are looking for a Geotechnical Design Engineer with experience in geotechnical design, analysis and writing technical proposals. The Geotechnical Design Engineer should be knowledgeable in basic soil mechanics, as well as experienced in geotechnical analysis and design software.

Reporting to the Design Manager, you will have the opportunity to collaborate with the Business Development Team to provide design support for tenders. You will be expected to review tender specifications, requirements and draft the technical proposals. Likewise, you will be working closely with the Operations team to perform design-related coordination work, analysing geotechnical issues at project sites, and preparing detailed drawings for the site team.

To be successful as a Geotechnical Design Engineer, you should be independent, demonstrate strong analytical thinking and be able to have prompt, open and direct communications with internal and external stakeholders to achieve project expectations. Outstanding candidates should be meticulous, detail oriented, demonstrate willingness to learn and display a positive attitude with a drive for results.

Think you’ve got what it takes?

A day in the life of Geotechnical Design Engineer

Design support for tenders:

  • Review and summarize soil condition reports, tender specifications and requirements.
  • Identify and summarise geotechnical problems and technical risk.
  • Analyse geotechnical problems and draft technical proposal.

Design-related coordination work for ongoing projects:

  • Perform analysis and design in accordance with current legislation, standards and codes of practice
  • Prepare detailed construction drawings with the assistance of draughtsperson.
  • Conduct regular site visits to integrate design concept and actual ground conditions.
  • Quality Control (QC) review and verification between design assumptions and actual site conditions.
  • Carry out geotechnical analysis and design using tools such as Slope/W and Plaxis as well as Keller’s in-house software.
  • Conduct back analysis and research for future improvements based on actual performance and as-built data.
  • Prepare technical proposal for remedial work during construction when required.
  • Liaise with clients/consultants/ sub-contractors on technical related issues.

Note: This role requires candidates to perform regular site walks at outdoor construction sites

You will need:

  • A professional degree in Civil or Geotechnical Engineering
  • 1-3 years of relevant working experience in Geotechnical Engineering
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Powerpoint), AutoCAD, Plaxis 2D and Plaxis 3D
  • A valid Supervise Construction Work for WSH certificate (preferable)

What we offer:

  • Annual Leave, Medical Insurance, Medical Leave, Variable Bonus, Learning & Development Opportunities, Referral Rewards & Employee Assistance Programme
  • Global & Regional networking opportunities
  • Friendly team and enjoyable working environment

We encourage applications from the right candidates regardless of age, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, belief or race. Learn more about Keller's Inclusion Commitment at https://www.keller.com/how-we-work/diversity-equity-and-inclusion

Find out more here:

https://www.keller.com/

title: Retail Assistant
raw_description:
Are you ready to immerse yourself in the captivating world of scented products? Lynk Fragrances, a distinguished Singaporean brand, is seeking passionate individuals to join our team as Retail Consultants. As the leading scented product maker in the country, we are committed to creating exceptional fragrances that enchant the senses and elevate everyday moments. We take immense pride in our use of high-quality ingredients, combining them with artistry to produce exquisite products that our customers adore.

By joining us, you will be part of a pioneer team for our retail front in Changi Airport, Terminal 2. If you are a dedicated and enthusiastic individual with a deep appreciation for scented products, we invite you to embark on this scintillating journey with Lynk Artisan.

Basic Salary + Commission. Other Benefits include Medical insurance, Birthday Leave, etc.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Promote and educate customers about Lynk Fragrances .
  • Convert customers and close sales to meet or exceed sales targets.
  • Track daily sales and collect customer feedback to address any issues or concerns.
  • Provide accurate product information and answer customer inquiries.
  • Maintain a tidy and organized area to uphold the brand image.
  • Serve customers professionally and deliver excellent customer experiences.
  • Perform stock checks every morning.
  • Request replenishment of stocks for retail activities and/or campaigns.

Requirements:

  • Prior F2F sales experience and able to assist customers to achieve a satisfying and enjoyable shopping experience.
  • Strong communication skills and ability to engage customers effectively.
  • Positive mindset with a can-do attitude.
  • Professional appearance and customer-centric mindset.
  • Multi-lingual is a bonus.
  • Willing to work on weekends, including public holidays.
  • Fresh graduates with a positive attitude are welcome to apply!

title: M & E Coordinator #80337
raw_description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Construction
  • Position Title: M & E Coordinator
  • Working Location: Bedok
  • Working Hours: Monday - Friday (9.00am – 6.00pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Review and coordinate M&E/MEP drawings, shop drawings, and specs; manage submissions/approvals for materials, samples, and method statements with consultants/authorities.
  • Liaise with clients, consultants, contractors, and subcontractors to resolve technical issues and ensure compliance with design and specifications.
  • Coordinate with architectural, structural, plumbing, and fire safety trades.
  • Supervise on-site M&E installations (HVAC/ACMV, electrical, lighting, plumbing, fire protection) for quality, safety, and code compliance.
  • Plan and oversee testing, commissioning, and inspections to ensure systems are ready for handover.
  • Track schedules and progress; report status, risks, and delays; support site coordination meetings.
  • Ensure compliance with regulations, codes of practice, standards, and safety requirements.
  • Maintain documentation: approvals, submissions, records, as-builts, and O&M manuals
  • Other tasks as assigned by Management.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering, Building Services, or related field.
  • 3–5 years of M&E coordination or supervision experience in construction.
  • Able to read and interpret design/shop drawings; proficient in CAD/AutoCAD; BIM tools (Revit/Navisworks) preferred.
  • Good knowledge of local codes, standards, and authority submission procedures.
  • Strong communication, coordination, planning, and organizational skills.
  • Safety-first mindset with knowledge of relevant safety regulations.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #80337 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.

title: Marketing and Event Executive
raw_description:
We are looking for a creative, hands-on Marketing Executiveto support K.STAR’s brand growth, promotions, and customer engagement.

This role works closely with the Founder and Operations Teamto execute marketing campaigns, manage content, and strengthen K.STAR’s premiumentertainment brand across digital and offline touchpoints.

Key Responsibilities:

Brand & Content Marketing      

Execute KSTAR brand messaging across social media, Website and in-store materials.

Assit in Content creation including:

  • Short media posts
  • Short-form video
  • Poster and visual assets
  • Caption EDMs and simpler Copywriting

Social Media & Digital Marketing

Manage daily content posting on platforms such as

  •  Instagram/Tikrok/Xiaohongshu(RED)/Wechat
  • Monitor engagement, comments, DMs and customer interactions
  • Support  digital marketing initiative including:
  • paid advertisementsPromotionsand influencer KOL collaborations (if any)

Campaigns & Promotions

Support marketing Campaigns for:

  • Membership promotions
  • Corporate Clients & events
  • Seasonal festive campaigns 
  • Assist in on-ground promotion and event execution

Corporate & Partnershipsupport 

  • Prepare simple marketing material for corporate Clients (PDF decks, visuals, post)

Support branding:

  •  Corporate eventsTeam-building activitiesand private functions.Assist in partnership and collaboration marketing initiatives.

Performance Tracking

  • Track basic marketing metrics such as
  • ReachEngagement Leads
  • Bookings
  • Andprepare simple reports and insights for continuous improvement.


Qualifications:

  • Diploma or bachelor’s degree in marketing, Mass Communications, Medial or related field.1 – 3 year experience (Fresh graduates with relevant internships of portfolio may considered)
  • Familiar with Instagram, TikTok, Xiaohongshu (RED), and WeChat
  • Basic content creation skills (copywriting, short videos, simple visuals)
  • Comfortable using tools like Canva, CapCut, or similar
  • Good communication skills
  • Hands-on, proactive, and able to work in a fast-paced environment
  • Flexibility to work irregular hours, including evenings and weekends, as required for events.

title: 3 Months Temp Medical Technologist (Chemistry bench) #HAL
raw_description:
Location: Aljunied
Salary: $18.40 per hour (No CPF)

Working Hours:
2 rotating shifts
• 8. 30 am to 5.00 pm
• 1.00 pm to 9.00 pm.

Job Description:
● Responsible to perform, depending on the section posted, a variety of test procedures according to the standards set in the Laboratory with little direct supervision by a senior staff
● Routine sample processing such as spinning and aliquoting of patient samples.
● Routine qualitative and quantitative chemical analyses on blood, CSF (cerebrospinal fluid), urine and other body fluids.
● Routine chemistry procedures including, microscopy (urine, dysmorphic RBCs) and serology (dengue, influenza covid combo test, urine preg)
● Minor equipment testing (iSTAT, glucometer, hemochron, urine dipstick)
● Minor equipment validation (Timer, pipette, thermometer).
● Administrative section - responsible to perform registration of patient samples, handling telephone inquiries by clients and printing and faxing of patient results. Result retrieval and record/specimen keeping.

Requirement:
● Min Bachelor Degree in Biomedical Science
● Min 1 month Lab experience
● Mandatory vaccinations are up to date ( Covid 3 jabs, MMR , Tdap, Varicella and Hep B)





Interested candidate, kindly send a copy of your resume to adelinelim@recruitexpress.com.sg

Email Address: adelinelim@recruitexpress.com.sg

title: Category Support Executive
raw_description:
DESCRIPTION OF ROLE 

The Category Support Executive is responsible for providing end-to-end operational and administrative support to the Commercial team, ensuring the timely execution of category action plans, accurate system and master data maintenance, effective coordination with suppliers and internal stakeholders, and seamless delivery of promotions and commercial activities.

Key Responsibilities

  • Partner closely with the Category Manager to support assigned categories in achieving sales, profit, income, market share, and productivity targets.

  • Coordinate and execute category action plans, ensuring timely implementation to meet commercial objectives.

  • Provide end-to-end administrative support for new supplier onboarding and new product development (NPD) processes.

  • Ensure all cost, price, and commercial changes are accurately and promptly updated in the system.

  • Manage timely creation and maintenance of new articles and item master data.

  • Support the administration and monitoring of consignment-related activities.

  • Maintain accurate, timely promotional downloads and coordinate approvals for press advertisements.

  • Support weekly promotion commitments and work cross-functionally with Operations, Marketing, Supply Chain, and suppliers to ensure smooth execution.

  • Liaise with suppliers on administrative updates, documentation, and operational requirements.

  • Ensure timely and accurate submission of documents for system maintenance and master data updates.

  • Proactively support internal stakeholders and communicate potential risks or issues that may impact business operations.

  • Perform other ad-hoc duties as assigned to support the Category team.

About You

  • Diploma or Degree in any discipline.

  • Prior administrative or coordination experience/internship is preferred.

  • Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel (e.g. Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP).

  • Knowledge of SAP or similar ERP systems is an advantage.

  • Strong communication and coordination skills with the ability to work across multiple stakeholders.

  • Meticulous, detail-oriented, and highly organized, with the ability to manage multiple tasks concurrently.

title: Procurement Officer - WCAN
raw_description:
Responsibilities:

  • Oversee the full procurement lifecycle, including sourcing local and international suppliers, negotiating contracts, and issuing purchase orders.

  • Develop and implement procurement strategies to optimize costs and enhance operational efficiency.

  • Conduct market research to identify and evaluate potential suppliers based on quality, pricing, and reliability.

  • Manage company facilities, logistics, and shipping operations for both local and international activities.

  • Ensure compliance with company policies, legal regulations, ISO standards, and HSE requirements.

  • Administer all company licensing, insurance renewals, and vehicle maintenance and registration.

  • Resolve supplier disputes and address issues related to delivery, quality, or performance.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support project planning and procurement requirements.

  • Monitor inventory levels, maintain accurate records, and forecast future needs to ensure optimal stock.


Qualifications:

  • Diploma or Degree in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related discipline.

  • Minimum 3 years of practical procurement experience, preferably within M&E, construction, engineering, facilities management, or manufacturing industries.

  • Excellent negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills.

  • Demonstrated ability to manage multiple procurement projects concurrently.

  • Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Capable of working independently or collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

  • Solid understanding of Singapore’s procurement regulations and industry best practices.


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

title: Graduate Trainee (Accounting Services)
raw_description:
Nexcore is a renowned consultancy firm dedicated to offering comprehensive solutions for businesses and individuals aiming for overseas operations and cross-border expansions. Our footprint spans globally, including pivotal regions like Singapore, Hong Kong, Japan, the US, Dubai, and China. Whether it's setting up company structures, accounting, or tax and legal compliance issues, our expert team is equipped to handle every challenge and ensure smooth business transitions.

Role Overview

As a Graduate Trainee (Accounting Services), you will receive hands-on training in bookkeeping and accounting support functions. This role is ideal for candidates who are looking to build a strong foundation in accounting and compliance, even without prior working experience.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in bookkeeping and maintenance of accounting records
  • Support preparation of management accounts and financial schedules
  • Assist with bank reconciliations, invoices, and expense tracking
  • Prepare supporting documents for audit and tax filing purposes
  • Maintain proper documentation and filing of accounting records
  • Communicate with clients to follow up on accounting-related information
  • Support the accounting team in day-to-day operational tasks

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business, or related fields
  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply; candidates with up to 1 year of accounting experience will be considered
  • Basic understanding of accounting principles is preferred (training will be provided)
  • Comfortable working with numbers and Excel
  • Good written and spoken English
  • Responsible, detail-oriented, and willing to learn

What We Offer

  • Structured training in accounting and compliance work
  • Exposure to SME and international client portfolios
  • Career development opportunities in professional services
  • Supportive team and learning environment
  • CPF contributions in accordance with local regulations

title: Mathematics Teacher
raw_description:
About Us:

Kangaroo Learning Centre Pte Ltd (“KLC”) was established in Singapore in May 2022 as part of the Fang Tian Education Group, a leading education institution founded in 2014 in China, which serves over 100,000 students annually.


We are one of Singapore’s fastest-growing math tuition centres. Out of 4000 students who participated in the Singapore Mathematical Olympiad (SMO), 118 students were invited for Rounds 2 and 51 are from our learning center. We are also the only centre in Singapore that offers parent sit-in during classes, a flexible refund policy, and a dual-teacher classroom model. Our unique approach and proven results have earned us a strong reputation among parents and students alike.


The centre offers a range of academic and enrichment programs for students of different ages, including primary and secondary school students, as well as those preparing for the PSLE, Math Olympiad, GCE ‘O’-Level and ‘A’-Level examinations.


At KLC, there's no office politics — we value direct, honest communication and a results-driven mindset. We’re not just looking for employees, but co-partners who are eager to grow with us, take initiative, and play an active role in building something meaningful together.


Job Overview:

At Kangaroo Learning Centre (KLC), our mission is to develop the best teachers in Singapore. We provide comprehensive training and a one-on-one mentorship program led by experienced senior teachers and management. Whether you're just starting out or looking to grow further, you'll receive the guidance, support, and structured development needed to thrive. Join us and build a rewarding teaching career with a clear path toward excellence, leadership, and long-term growth.


Job Responsibilities:

  • Create an interactive, inquiry-based, and student-centred classroom environment that guides and motivates students to enjoy learning mathematics.
  • Communicate closely with students, provide timely feedback to parents, and proactively support students in their learning.
  • Participate in center branding activities such as YouTube content creation, article writing and sharing, etc.
  • Familiarity with the question-setting patterns and trends of PSLE, O-Level, A-Level, and Math Olympiad competitions (e.g., RMO, APMOPS, NMOS, SMO) is an added advantage.
  • Support and participate in any teaching-related tasks and team activities assigned by the centre.

Job Requirements:

  • A bachelor’s degree or above from an accredited university (e.g., NUS, NTU, SMU, or equivalent).
  • Candidates without experience are welcome to apply.
  • Open to all nationalities (Sponsored for work passes)
  • No prior teaching experience required — comprehensive training and mentorship will be provided.
  • Responsible, adaptable, and willing to continuously learning.
  • Excellent interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills, with a positive, collaborative attitude and a strong passion for working closely with students, parents, and colleagues.
  • Able to commit weekdays (inc. evenings) & weekends (Note: Most student classes are held on weekends)

What We Offer

  • Performance-based salary reviews — high-performing teachers may receive salary of up to S$11,960 per month.
  • Additional S$1,000 monthly Guaranteed Teaching Allowance will be paid during the first 3 months probationary period.
  • The first year S$50,000 Guaranteed Annual Salary. We top up the balance if you didn’t get S$50,000 annual salary in the first year.
  • Structured one-on-one mentorship and coaching.
  • Comprehensive training — perfect for those starting their teaching career.
  • Dual career progression paths provided — grow into either a senior teaching expert or move towards leadership and management roles.
  • Opportunities to be involved in content creation, curriculum development, conducting activities with students and parents, and team leadership.

title: Research Assistant, School of Computing
raw_description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS Career Portal

Your application will be processed only if you apply via NUS Career Portal

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Description

The National University of Singapore invites applications for the position of Research Fellow, Research Associate, or Research Assistant in the Department of Computer Science, School of Computing (SoC). SoC is strongly committed to research excellence in all its dimensions: Searching for fundamental results and insights, developing novel computational solutions to a wide range of applications, building large-scale experimental systems and improving the well-being of society. We seek to play an active role both internationally and locally in the core and emerging areas of Computer Science and Information Systems

The successful candidates will work closely with Principal Investigator Prof. Tulika Mitra on a recently funded Green AI project. This ambitious research initiative targets energy-efficient AI inference, co-optimizing across the full stack - from algorithms to architecture. The goal is to rethink data center computation and communication systems to make AI workloads significantly more sustainable. The ideal candidate will have experience in computing systems, such as ML systems, computer architecture, FPGA/GPU/accelerator design, compilers, or operating systems. We are looking for individuals who are passionate about systems-level innovation, eager to work across abstraction layers, and motivated to push the frontiers of sustainable and scalable AI

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified. 

Qualifications

•    PhD degree in a relevant area for research fellow and research associate position
•    Bachelors or Masters degree in a relevant area for research assistant position
•    Experience in research

title: Paralegal / Legal Executive
raw_description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Paralegal / Legal Executive to join our Private Wealth Practice team. The successful candidate will assist our lawyers with various private wealth and asset management matters, including legal research, document preparation, and translation.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Assist in legal research, and document preparation.
  • Manage the document review process by coordinating comments from multiple sources and incorporating modifications under supervision.
  • Prepare preliminary and other basic deal documents.
  • Coordinate and manage document review processes by liaising with internal stakeholders, fund administrators, trustees, tax advisors and other professional parties, and consolidate comments and revisions.
  • Assist in cross-border matters involving Singapore, China and other jurisdictions, including translating legal documents and correspondence between English and Mandarin Chinese, where required.
  • Ensure confidentiality and adhere to ethical standards in all aspects of work.
  • Perform other duties as assigned.

Qualifications & Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Law or above; legal training and qualification preferred.
  • Minimum of two years of paralegal experience in a law firm or in-house legal department preferred.
  • Excellent organizational and communication skills.
  • Proficiency in English is required. Working proficiency in Mandarin is required to communicate with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders and review or translate basic Chinese-language materials.
  • Meticulous, able to multitask, and ensure transaction timelines are met.
  • Ownership-driven and proactive, able to manage matters independently and push projects forward.
  • Proficiency in MS Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.

title: Clinical Associate
raw_description:
The National University Health System (NUHS) is an integrated Academic Health System and Regional Health System in Singapore that delivers value-driven, innovative and sustainable healthcare. Institutions in the NUHS group include three hospitals – National University Hospital, Ng Teng Fong General Hospital and Jurong Community Hospital; three National Specialty Centres – National University Cancer Institute, Singapore, National University Heart Centre, Singapore and National University Centre for Oral Health, Singapore; a polyclinic group – the National University Polyclinics; one medical centre – Jurong Medical Centre; and three academic health sciences institutions – National University of Singapore (NUS) Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine (including the Alice Lee Centre for Nursing Studies), NUS Faculty of Dentistry and NUS Saw Swee Hock School of Public Health.


The Departments are seeking candidates who are highly motivated and willing to join us for a challenging and fulfilling appointment as Clinical Associate on a contractual basis.


As a clinical associate, you will be responsible for the total management of patients in the ward and administrative duties required of the department to provide direct patient care. In addition, you will be responsible for assisting the Registrar and Senior Staff in the running of the Specialist Outpatient Clinics.

•Be in active clinical practice •Possess a basic medical degree registrable with the Singapore Medical Council

•Possess a 3 year of post housemanship clinical experience

•Must be registered with the Singapore Medical Council

•Able to work independently with demonstrated competence in managing patients in the department

•Confident, takes initiatives and a good team player
